  "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { usePathname } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport { Github, Linkedin } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { ThemeToggle } from \"./theme-toggle\";\nimport { LanguageToggle } from \"./language-toggle\";\nimport { useTranslations } from \"next-intl\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\n/**\n * 导航栏组件\n * 包含页面链接、社交媒体图标、主题切换和语言切换按钮\n */\nexport function Navigation({ locale }: { locale: string }) {\n  const pathname = usePathname();\n  const t = useTranslations(\"nav\");\n\n  // 导航链接配置\n  const navLinks = [\n    { href: `/${locale}`, label: t(\"home\") },\n    { href: `/${locale}/articles`, label: t(\"articles\") },\n    { href: `/${locale}/resume`, label: t(\"resume\") },\n    { href: `/${locale}/knowledge`, label: t(\"knowledge\") },\n  ];\n\n  // 社交媒体链接配置\n  const socialLinks = [\n    {\n      href: \"https://github.com/Sakura-echos\",\n      icon: Github,\n      label: \"GitHub\",\n    },\n    {\n      href: \"https://www.linkedin.com/in/zijie-huang-218811297/\",\n      icon: Linkedin,\n      label: \"LinkedIn\",\n    },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <nav className=\"sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-sm\">\n      <div className=\"container mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8\">\n        <div className=\"flex h-16 items-center justify-between\">\n          {/* Logo */}\n          <Link\n            href={`/${locale}`}\n            className=\"text-xl font-bold text-text-primary hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity\"\n          >\n            Geeki\n          </Link>\n\n          {/* 桌面端导航 */}\n          <div className=\"hidden md:flex items-center space-x-1\">\n            {/* 页面链接 */}\n            {navLinks.map((link) => (\n              <Link\n                key={link.href}\n                href={link.href}\n                className={cn(\n                  \"px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors\",\n                  pathname === link.href\n                    ? \"bg-background-secondary text-text-primary\"\n                    : \"text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary hover:bg-background-secondary\"\n                )}\n              >\n                {link.label}\n              </Link>\n            ))}\n\n            {/* 分隔符 */}\n            <div className=\"w-px h-6 bg-border mx-2\" />\n\n            {/* 社交媒体图标 */}\n            {socialLinks.map((link) => (\n              <a\n                key={link.href}\n                href={link.href}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-background-secondary transition-colors\"\n                aria-label={link.label}\n                title={link.label}\n              >\n                <link.icon className=\"w-5 h-5 text-text-primary\" />\n              </a>\n            ))}\n\n            {/* 主题切换 */}\n            <ThemeToggle />\n\n            {/* 语言切换 */}\n            <LanguageToggle />\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 移动端导航 */}\n          <div className=\"flex md:hidden items-center space-x-1\">\n            {socialLinks.map((link) => (\n              <a\n                key={link.href}\n                href={link.href}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-background-secondary transition-colors\"\n                aria-label={link.label}\n              >\n                <link.icon className=\"w-5 h-5 text-text-primary\" />\n              </a>\n            ))}\n            <ThemeToggle />\n            <LanguageToggle />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 移动端页面链接 */}\n        <div className=\"flex md:hidden pb-3 space-x-1 overflow-x-auto\">\n          {navLinks.map((link) => (\n            <Link\n              key={link.href}\n              href={link.href}\n              className={cn(\n                \"px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-colors\",\n                pathname === link.href\n
